title: German-Style Baked Chicken
description: A classic German-inspired dish featuring baked chicken with a crispy, garlicky crust and a side of flaky biscuits.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, dried oregano, and melted butter.
Season the chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
Dredge the chicken in flour, shaking off excess.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the garlic-oil mixture evenly over the chicken.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Meanwhile, prepare the flaky biscuits according to package instructions.
Serve the baked chicken with warm flaky biscuits on the side.
